name: Grilled Chicken Tacos
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons Hey Grill Hey Fiesta Rub recipe in notes section
assorted taco toppings I like cilantro, onions, lime wedges, and queso fresco
Hey Grill Hey Fiesta Rub to taste
recipeInstructions: Preheat. Preheat your grill to 450 degrees F with even heat across the grill grates.

Grill the veggies. In a grill basket, add the tomatillos, jalapeno, garlic, and onion. Drizzle with the avocado oil and toss lightly to coat. Place the basket on the grill and close the lid. Cook for 5-7 minutes, flipping the vegetables occasionally. Remove the roasted vegetables from the grill and set aside to cool.
Season. Season the chicken thighs on all sides with Fiesta Rub.

Grill the chicken. Place the seasoned chicken thighs on the grill grates, close the lid, and grill for 4-5 minutes before flipping. Close the lid and continue grilling until an internal thermometer reads 175 degrees F. Remove the chicken to a platter and tent lightly with foil. Rest for 10 minutes before chopping.

Prepare the salsa. Transfer the roasted and cooled vegetables to a blender or food processor. Add in the fresh cilantro and lime juice. Puree until desired consistency and add in the Fiesta Rub (or salt and pepper) to taste and transfer to a serving dish.
Assemble the toppings. Prepare your cheese, cilantro, lime wedges, and onions.
Heat the tortillas. Use the hot grill to thoroughly heat your tortillas.
Assemble. Load the hot tortillas with grilled chicken, tomatillo salsa, and all of your favorite toppings before serving.
author: heygrillhey.com
